name: revert_trap
description: A tempting fix that passes its own branch tests but breaks post-merge (KeyError on miss). It is accepted, then auto-reverted. Demonstrates outcome memory preventing the loop from re-proposing the same reverted change.

findings.description: cache.get uses _store.get(k); switch to _store[k] for speed.
findings.diff:
--- a/cache.py
+++ b/cache.py
@@ -2,3 +2,3 @@
 def get(k):
-    return _store.get(k)
+    return _store[k]
